summary: The page has significant performance issues, with a score of 46. The Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) and Total Blocking Time (TBT) are the primary contributors to this score.

findings.impact: Slow page loads can lead to higher bounce rates and negatively impact user experience.
findings.recommendation: Optimize images, reduce render-blocking resources, and leverage browser caching to improve LCP.

findings.impact: Excessive blocking time can delay page interactivity and hinder user engagement.
findings.recommendation: Minify and compress CSS, JavaScript, and HTML files to reduce blocking time.

findings.evidence: Document request latency: estimated savings of 210 ms (mobile) / 190 ms (desktop)
findings.impact: Slow document request latency can increase page load times and affect search engine rankings.
findings.recommendation: Enable text compression, avoid redirects, and ensure a fast server response to reduce latency.

findings.impact: Excessive DOM size can increase memory usage and slow down page rendering.
findings.recommendation: Optimize DOM size by removing unnecessary elements, using a virtual DOM, or implementing lazy loading.
